what_it_does: Records one post-compaction work stretch from 2026-06-12, including what this agent-context read, changed, built, did not touch, and left unresolved.
observations: Defines compaction as ending one agent-context and starting another with only summaries and disk state available.
States the file is not a repo map or lineage reconstruction, but a factual log of one stretch.
Lists source-reading coverage, registry widening, generated pieces, verdict writing, factory recompilation, and documentation outputs.
Separates completed work from non-work, including unread folders, mockups not updated, and spacing work not completed.
Includes drift-check suggestions while explicitly saying they are not quality assessments.
standouts: The file makes context boundaries part of the record rather than treating the session as continuous.
It tracks evidence status, tags, versions, and unread areas directly in the handover.
The spacing investigation is recorded with both findings and the reverted convention.
conventions: Uses dated factual bullets with explicit completed, reverted, and not-done states.
Names files, directories, generated artifacts, version labels, and provenance tags inline.
Avoids code-symbol documentation and instead documents process, evidence, and scope boundaries.
Uses parenthetical qualifiers to distinguish source-derived facts from inferred or unfinished work.
concerns: Some bullets combine many actions and artifacts, which makes individual facts dense to extract.
Path shorthand such as ellipses depends on nearby context.
The suggestions section is framed as non-assessment but still uses drift-check language that could be read as evaluative.
notes: A scoped handover log that preserves what one post-compaction context actually did and where its knowledge stops.
questions: What is the exact boundary of the referenced coverage-1 commit?
Which 13 face registries correspond to the listed version names?
What criteria would finish the unresolved spacing vocabulary work?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the content: it documents one post-compaction stretch, its factual actions, and its knowledge limits.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to prevent later agents from treating a compacted session as continuous memory by leaving a precise, scoped operational record.
novelty: The file explicitly treats an agent-context as a bounded documentary subject and logs both production work and epistemic limits.
contribution: Contributes a neutral provenance layer for one work stretch: source coverage, registry changes, generated pieces, unresolved spacing findings, reconstructed lineage outputs, onboarding artifacts, and explicit unread boundaries.
summary_for_embedding: A 2026-06-12 handover document that factually records one post-compaction agent-context's source reading, registry updates, generated design pieces, documentation work, unfinished spacing investigation, and unread areas.
intention_for_embedding: It was written to preserve handoff clarity after compaction by stating what this context actually knows, did, changed, reverted, and left untouched.
